title: Flipkart Books is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Flipkart Books is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
